name: Pre-existing low visibility + new AI—how to fix in New York?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing low visibility + new AI—how to fix in New York?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Layer new recognitions on existing PR; AI rewards pattern buildup.** Legacy sites ignored, but fresh signals help. **Key factors:** 1) Recent awards; 2) Multi-source; 3) NY competition; 4) Audit first. Start small, scale; expect 2-4 months.[3]
